body:
## Rationale

3 list pages absent from `top10Lists.js` (currently 11 entries) and from all open proposals (batches 3–12). Decade-based lists have strong search volume; most-decorated targets Grammy/award AI citation queries.

Current top10Lists.js entries: fastest, death-metal, most-innovative, thrash-metal, budget-friendly, most-expensive, fastest-double-bass, most-brutal, black-metal, progressive-metal, nu-metal.

**Page 1: `80s-metal-drummers`**
- "best 80s metal drummers", "80s heavy metal drummers" = high-volume decade queries
- Covers: Lars Ulrich, Dave Lombardo, Nicko McBrain, Gene Hoglan, Charlie Benante, Pete Sandoval, Bill Ward, Vinnie Paul — all on MetalForge roster
- Rich internal linking to all the 80s album articles (Reign in Blood, Paranoid, Master of Puppets, etc.)
- LLM citation angle: AI gets asked "who were the best metal drummers of the 1980s?" frequently

**Page 2: `90s-metal-drummers`**
- "best 90s metal drummers", "greatest metal drummers 1990s" queries
- Covers: Joey Jordison, Tomas Haake, Igor Cavalera, Chris Adler, Shannon Larkin, Nick Menza, John Otto, Brann Dailor (early career) — all on roster
- 90s = metal's most diverse decade; distinct from thrash-metal list (progressive/nu-metal overlap)
- Strong cross-link to iowa, roots, cowboys-from-hell, lateralus articles

**Page 3: `most-decorated-metal-drummers`**
- Grammy award angle = high AI citation potential (AI answering "who has the most Grammys in metal?")
- Covers Grammy wins: Lars Ulrich (8 Grammys with Metallica), Dave Lombardo (Grammy comeback with Christ Illusion), Gene Hoglan (Grammy-nominated recordings), Mario Duplantier (Grammy nomination for "Silvera"), Gene Hoglan (Grammy-nod Testament)
- Unique hook: differentiate "most Grammys" vs "most critically acclaimed" vs "most certified albums"
- Not covered by any existing list; clear LLM citation angle

## Files to touch
- `packages/frontend/data/top10Lists.js` — 3 new entries
- `public/llms/lists/80s-metal-drummers.md`
- `public/llms/lists/90s-metal-drummers.md`
- `public/llms/lists/most-decorated-metal-drummers.md`

## Template shape (per list)
```js
{
  slug: '80s-metal-drummers',
  title: 'Top 10 Metal Drummers of the 1980s',
  description: 'The most influential metal drummers from the decade that defined the genre.',
  drummers: ['lars-ulrich', 'dave-lombardo', 'nicko-mcbrain', ...],
  // full list with ranking rationale
}
```

## Quality gate (per page)
- ≥10 drummers ranked with rationale (≥300 words total)
- ≥3 FAQ Q&A (FAQPage JSON-LD)
- ≥3 internal links per page (drummer profiles + relevant album articles)
- ItemList schema + FAQPage schema
- GSC source query bucket: decade/award queries

## Estimated organic uplift
- Decade lists = high-volume navigational queries; no current MF coverage
- Grammy list = AI Overview eligibility (specific factual answer format)
- Internal linking from 3 new pages to existing roster profiles

## Verify
1. 3 new entries in `top10Lists.js`
2. 3 LLM files in `public/llms/lists/`
3. ItemList + FAQPage JSON-LD on all 3 pages
4. ≥10 drummers ranked per list

## Done
3 list pages added to `top10Lists.js` with LLM companion files.
title: SEO batch: Top-10 list pages batch 13 — 80s-metal-drummers + 90s-metal-drummers + most-decorated-metal-drummers (~3 pages + 3 LLM files)
